message:
fix(tui): remove dead code from agents and tool_metrics screens

- agents.rs: Remove 13 lines of unused code
- tool_metrics.rs: Remove 13 lines of unused code
- Beads: update issue statuses
- Sync conformance archives and legacy Python reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-{"id":"br-10wc.13","title":"[track] PTY E2E and performance harness with detailed artifacts","description":"Build the canonical PTY E2E + perf harness for the one-command AgentMailTUI workflow, with artifact-rich diagnostics.

Required E2E scenarios:
- Startup smoke: `am` launches server+TUI by default and reaches ready state.
- Navigation: tab/number/palette/help flows across major screens.
- Live behavior: event ingestion appears in dashboard/log surfaces under real requests.
- Search flows: interactive query, result navigation, deep-link pivots.
- MCP/API mode switching and parity checks for key operations.
- Clean shutdown semantics (`q`, Ctrl+C, and server-stop propagation).
- Headless fallback (`--no-tui` and/or non-TTY behavior).

Performance harness requirements:
- Repeatable PTY/perf scenarios with explicit thresholds (render latency, event throughput, memory growth).
- Detailed logs/artifacts on failure (captured output, timing markers, state snapshots).

Test design constraints:
- Deterministic and CI-stable.
- Fast enough for routine validation while still catching regressions.
- Clear separation between functional failures vs performance budget failures.

This task supersedes duplicate E2E umbrella beads and is the single source of truth for PTY/integration validation.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:18:03.047794394Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T03:54:17.897327041Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"br-10wc.13","depends_on_id":"br-10wc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:18:03.047794394Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-10wc.13","depends_on_id":"br-10wc.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:20:06.562575325Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-10wc.13","depends_on_id":"br-10wc.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:20:05.750730140Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-10wc.13","depends_on_id":"br-10wc.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:20:05.863947940Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-10wc.13","depends_on_id":"br-10wc.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:20:05.981851173Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-10wc.13","depends_on_id":"br-10wc.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:20:06.097264644Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-10wc.13","depends_on_id":"br-10wc.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:20:06.327832441Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"br-10wc.14","title":"[track] Documentation, runbook, and rollout hardening","description":"Own complete documentation/runbook/rollout hardening for the new default workflow where `am` starts server + TUI together.

Required docs scope:
- Simplified quick start replacing brittle manual env command chains.
- Clear explanation of default behavior, optional headless/diagnostic modes, and MCP/API operation.
- Operator controls reference (keybindings, layout tuning, troubleshooting, recovery paths).
- Configuration documentation: layout persistence, theme/env controls, and safe defaults.
- Contributor guidance for extending screens/features without breaking architecture/testing contracts.
- Release validation checklist tying functional + test + perf + docs readiness together.

Quality bar:
- Docs must be self-contained, operationally useful, and aligned with actual runtime behavior.
- Troubleshooting steps must include concrete checks/remediation, not generic advice.

This task supersedes duplicate documentation umbrella beads and is the canonical documentation plan for AgentMailTUI rollout.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:18:03.150917705Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T03:54:18.301266001Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"br-10wc.14","depends_on_id":"br-10wc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:18:03.150917705Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-10wc.14","depends_on_id":"br-10wc.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:20:06.804244346Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
